---
title: "Git for Everyone"
subtitle: "An Introduction to Version Control and GitHub"

output-file: index

format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: c/t
    embed-resources: true
    chalkboard: false
    preview-links: auto
    history: false
    highlight-style: a11y
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: false
    logo: images/iap_logo_en-1920px_white.png
    theme: [dark, custom.scss]
revealjs-plugins:
  - attribution

authors:
  - name: Jared Frazier
    orcid: 0000-0001-8221-7972
    affiliations:
      - ref: iap
affiliations:
  - id: iap
    name: Modelling of Atmospheric Processes Department <br> Leibniz Institute of Atmospheric Physics 

date: "2026-03-18"
# bibliography: references.bib
---

## Precursors {.smaller .nostretch}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="65%"}
#### Slides and Materials

<!-- TODO: change local host here... -->

To access links or follow on your own device these slides can be found at:  
[https://jfdev001.github.io/talks/git-for-everyone/](http://localhost:4000/talks/git-for-everyone/)

\

All source code is available at:

::: {.column style="font-size: 95%;"}

- [github.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop](https://github.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop)
- [gitlab.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop](https://gitlab.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop)
:::
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="30%"}

{{< fa solid person-chalkboard >}}:
{{< qrcode https://github.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop fkrycvbsgt width=150 height=150 >}}

\

{{< fa brands github >}}:
{{< qrcode https://github.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop qr7dekity9 width=150 height=150 >}}

:::
::::
